customers.name: Committed Home Buyer / Tenant Seeker
customers.description: A high-intent consumer accountable for finding a suitable home within budget and time constraints while minimizing regret, hidden costs, and search friction. Economic success is measured by time-to-transaction, budget adherence, and confidence in decision quality. Failure risk is choosing the wrong property, overpaying, missing the right listing, or wasting months in search.
winsThem: High-quality search and map discovery
Trustworthy pricing and valuation context
Saved searches with low-noise alerts
Fast contact and tour scheduling flows
Personalized recommendations that actually match intent
theirFear: Missing the best property before acting
Overpaying or underestimating total monthly cost
Being spammed by agents without getting useful responses

jobsToBeDone.name: Discover and shortlist the right property
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Turn a vague housing need into a ranked shortlist of viable homes that fit price, location, financing, and lifestyle constraints.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: A confident shortlist with high match quality, low search time, and clear next actions.

steps.description: Set location, budget, property type, size, lifestyle, commute, and must-have preferences.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Homepage
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Captures initial intent and routes the user into relevant search, valuation, and financing journeys.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Search Engine Results Page (SERP)
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports structured filtering by geography, budget, attributes, and search refinement.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: GeoRef
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides map, address, and location intelligence required for local search precision.

steps.description: Compare asking prices to local market conditions and affordability constraints.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Market Knowledge
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Adds area-level price and market tension context to improve pricing confidence.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Property Estimation
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides indicative fair-value benchmarks to reduce overpayment risk.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Home Purchase Financing
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Translates listing price into monthly affordability and financing feasibility.

steps.description: Save favorites, compare options, and receive alerts when new matches appear.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Consumer Portal
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Stores favorites, preferences, and search state across sessions.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Saved Search / Alerts
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Reduces monitoring effort and increases speed-to-awareness for new matching inventory.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Classifieds Recommendations
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Surfaces relevant inventory beyond explicit filters using inferred intent.

jobsToBeDone.name: Engage and progress to a transaction
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Move from shortlist to viewing, qualification, and decision with minimal friction and maximum response quality.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Higher response rates, faster viewing coordination, and stronger conversion to offer or lease application.

steps.description: Review detailed media, disclosures, features, and seller or agent credibility.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Classified Details Page (CDP)
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Presents the property story, images, facts, and conversion surfaces for the listing.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Intermediary Profile & Directory
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Builds trust in the professional representing the property.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Agents Ratings & Reviews
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Adds credibility and service-quality signals before outreach.

steps.description: Submit inquiry, message the listing side, and arrange a viewing or next step.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Consumer Contacting Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides a standardized inquiry flow that reduces drop-off and incomplete leads.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Chat Messaging Services
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Enables threaded communication and responsiveness measurement.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Notification Service
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Keeps the seeker informed about replies, viewing updates, and new actions needed.

steps.description: Compare options against payment scenarios, trade-offs, and urgency to act.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Home Purchase Financing
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Connects price to borrowing power and monthly cost scenarios.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Property Decision Tools
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Helps compare shortlisted homes and reduce decision regret.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Location Insights
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Adds neighborhood-level signals that influence final selection.

top.name: Successful housing decision rate
top.description: Share of high-intent seekers who find and progress on a suitable property with high confidence and acceptable economics.

children.name: Time to qualified shortlist
children.description: Median time from first session to first shortlist meeting intent quality threshold.

children.name: Relevant listing view rate
children.description: Share of listing detail views that are later saved, contacted, or revisited.

children.name: Alert usefulness
children.description: Share of alerts that lead to open, click, or save actions.

children.name: New match precision
children.description: Share of recommended or alerted listings rated relevant by downstream behavior.

children.name: Price confidence score
children.description: User-reported confidence that the listing is fairly priced relative to the market.

children.name: Valuation engagement rate
children.description: Share of listing sessions engaging with price, market, or financing context.

children.name: Inquiry-to-response rate
children.description: Share of seeker inquiries receiving a meaningful response within SLA.

children.name: Median first response time
children.description: Time from inquiry submission to first qualified reply.

top.name: Qualified demand GMV influence
top.description: Economic value of property transactions and leases materially influenced by the platform's demand generation and conversion surfaces.

children.name: High-intent active seekers
children.description: Users with repeated search, save, financing, and contact behavior indicating transaction intent.

children.name: Search-to-contact conversion
children.description: Share of high-intent seekers that contact at least one listing side.

children.name: Lead revenue
children.description: Revenue from delivering qualified consumer demand to paying professionals or owners.

children.name: Qualified lead volume
children.description: Number of paid or monetizable inquiries passing quality thresholds.

children.name: Attach revenue
children.description: Revenue from mortgages, rentals services, insurance, utilities, and related consumer attach products.

children.name: Finance attach rate
children.description: Share of high-intent seekers that start a financing journey.

productStrategy.vision: Become the default decision layer for residential property discovery by compressing search time, increasing confidence, and orchestrating the path from intent to transaction.

1_year.focus: Reliability, search relevance, lead quality, and trust-building around pricing and responsiveness.
milestones: Improve ranking using behavioral relevance and freshness signals
Standardize listing details and contact forms across web and mobile
Launch response-time transparency for listing representatives
Deploy saved search and recommendation precision improvements
Embed affordability tools into high-intent listing flows

3_year.focus: Marketplace liquidity optimization, personalization, and multi-step buyer journey orchestration.

supporting: Repeat seeker retention through search journey

revenueStreams: Premium consumer subscription for advanced search and decision tools
Rental application and tenant screening revenue
supporting: Take rate per qualified demand event

milestones: Launch guided move journey across discovery, financing, touring, and offer support
Deploy personalized inventory recommendations at scale
Introduce unified identity and cross-device state persistence
Build integrated viewing scheduling and application workflows
Operationalize neighborhood and property decision intelligence

5_year.focus: Financialization and ecosystem orchestration where the platform acts as the control point for housing decisions and related services.

supporting: Annual re-engagement rate for owners and renters

revenueStreams: Consumer subscription and data-powered guidance products
supporting: Platform share of housing lifecycle events
Retention of households across move, own, rent, refinance cycles

milestones: Launch household property wallet with owned, rented, and target homes
Integrate embedded financial offers and transaction readiness scoring
Create cross-partner orchestration APIs for tours, applications, mortgages, and closing services
Establish trusted property graph and lifecycle identity for homes and households
Monetize recurring household engagement beyond the initial transaction

customers.name: Individual Seller / Landlord
customers.description: A property owner accountable for maximizing sale price or rental yield while minimizing time on market, hassle, vacancy, and intermediary costs. Economic success is measured by net proceeds, occupancy, and speed. Failure risk is underpricing, prolonged time on market, bad tenant or buyer quality, and low-quality lead flow.
careAbout: Achieving the highest realistic price or rent
Reducing time on market or vacancy
Trustworthy valuation and listing performance insight
winsThem: Accurate valuation and pricing guidance
Low-friction listing creation and management
Transparent lead quality and response tools
Actionable coaching on how to improve listing performance
Optional agent handoff when self-serve stops being efficient
theirFear: Leaving money on the table with poor pricing
Getting flooded with unqualified or fraudulent inquiries
Failing to sell or rent fast enough and carrying extra cost

jobsToBeDone.name: Price and prepare a property for market
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Determine the right price, timing, and go-to-market approach for selling or renting a property.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: A market-ready property with credible price expectations and a clear distribution strategy.

steps.description: Estimate the likely sale price or rental price based on address, condition, comparables, and local demand.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Price Page
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Shows local price patterns and anchors owner expectations with market context.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Property Estimation
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Produces a property-specific valuation starting point.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Property Knowledge
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides underlying property facts and historical data required for credible estimation.

steps.description: Choose self-serve listing, agent-assisted sale, or landlord workflow depending on urgency and complexity.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Estimation Funnel
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Captures owner intent and qualification signals that determine the best monetization or service path.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Owner Coaching Experience
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Guides owners through pricing, timing, and whether to self-serve or seek professional support.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Seller Lead Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports nurture and conversion when an owner becomes a supply lead routed to professionals.

steps.description: Create the property narrative, photos, attributes, and publishing readiness needed for strong marketplace performance.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: FSBO Online Classifieds Acquisition
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Allows owners to create and publish a listing without an agent.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Owner Classifieds Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Lets owners edit, monitor, and optimize their published listings.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Fraud Detection
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Protects listing integrity and reduces risk of low-trust inventory.

jobsToBeDone.name: Capture demand and convert it efficiently
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Generate qualified buyer or tenant interest and progress the best prospects quickly.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Higher close probability, better economics, and less owner effort per successful transaction.

steps.description: Ensure the listing gets enough qualified impressions in relevant geographies and buyer cohorts.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Classifieds Visibility Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Controls distribution and paid visibility logic for the listing.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Classifieds Sort Order
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Improves ranking exposure based on quality, relevance, and monetization signals.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Off-Platform Advertising
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Extends supply distribution to external demand channels when incremental reach is needed.

steps.description: Receive inquiries, evaluate seriousness, and prioritize the best prospects.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Consumer Contacting Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Structures demand capture into more complete and comparable inquiry data.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Seeker Lead Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Stores and operationalizes incoming lead flow for follow-up.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Lead Scorings
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Ranks prospects by likely quality and conversion potential.

steps.description: Improve listing performance or hand the opportunity to an agent when self-serve efficiency drops.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Classifieds Performance Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Shows performance signals that indicate whether pricing or media need improvement.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Prospection Map
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Can route owner intent into agency demand where agent assistance creates better close probability.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Lead x Agent Matching
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Connects the owner or lead with the right agent when escalation is appropriate.

top.name: Net proceeds / yield realization
top.description: Difference between realized economics and the owner's realistic market target after fees, vacancy, and concessions.

children.name: Pricing accuracy
children.description: Distance between initial list price and efficient market-clearing price.

children.name: Valuation confidence
children.description: Owner confidence in pricing recommendation before listing launch.

children.name: Time on market / vacancy
children.description: Elapsed time until accepted offer or occupied rental.

children.name: Qualified inquiry rate
children.description: Number of qualified inquiries per active listing period.

children.name: Effort per transaction
children.description: Owner time spent managing listing, inquiries, and coordination.

children.name: Inbox management efficiency
children.description: Time required to review, prioritize, and respond to inquiries.

children.name: Lead quality satisfaction
children.description: Owner assessment of whether incoming demand is serious and relevant.

children.name: Spam / fraud incidence
children.description: Share of inquiries or listing events flagged as low trust.

top.name: Supply monetization revenue
top.description: Revenue generated from owners through listing products, supply lead monetization, and related services.

children.name: Owner lead capture
children.description: Number of owners entering valuation, listing, or sell/rent intent funnels.

children.name: Estimation-to-listing conversion
children.description: Share of owners who progress from valuation or coaching into active listing or agent handoff.

children.name: Listing product revenue
children.description: Revenue from self-serve listing fees, upgrades, and visibility packages.

children.name: Paid visibility attach rate
children.description: Share of owner listings purchasing a promotional or visibility product.

children.name: Supply lead referral revenue
children.description: Revenue from routing owners to paying agents or property managers.

children.name: Agent acceptance rate
children.description: Share of routed owner leads accepted by professionals at target economics.

productStrategy.vision: Own the earliest and highest-intent owner decision moments so the platform becomes the default route to price, prepare, list, and monetize residential property.

1_year.focus: Strengthen owner acquisition funnels, valuation credibility, and self-serve listing basics.
1_year.productTheme: Owner intent capture and listing reliability

revenueStreams: Seller lead referral fees to agents
supporting: Owner listing retention through sale cycle

milestones: Improve estimation funnel completion and identity capture
Launch owner coaching with pricing and readiness guidance
Reduce friction in self-serve listing creation
Add performance insight for owner listings
Create smart agent handoff for stalled or high-value owners

3_year.focus: Optimize supply yield and owner monetization across self-serve, agent-assisted, and rental workflows.

revenueStreams: Rental listing and tenant screening products
Premium owner subscription for portfolio and market intelligence

milestones: Launch owner dashboard for performance, pricing, and lead quality
Add rental owner workflows and vacancy optimization tools
Deploy adaptive pricing guidance based on market response
Enable automated nurture for dormant or not-yet-ready owners
Integrate deeper professional matching and handoff economics

5_year.focus: Turn property ownership into a recurring platform relationship spanning sale, rent, refinance, maintenance, and reinvestment.

revenueStreams: Embedded property finance and refinance revenue
Property management and maintenance partner commissions

milestones: Launch owner property wallet linking all owned assets
Add recurring valuation, refinance, and rental optimization journeys
Create owner partner marketplace for maintenance and property services
Operationalize data network effects from recurring ownership events
Monetize longitudinal owner intelligence and lifecycle orchestration

customers.name: Brokerage Owner / Agency Growth Manager
customers.description: A professional real estate operator accountable for revenue growth, agent productivity, listing acquisition, and ROI on marketing spend. Economic success is driven by closings, commission volume, listing share, and cost per qualified lead. Failure risk is weak lead quality, poor response performance, low listing visibility, and churn from the platform due to poor unit economics.
careAbout: Winning more listings in local farm areas
Improving agent response and close rates
winsThem: Transparent lead quality and attribution
Strong listing distribution and ranking tools
Prospecting intelligence to find owners before competitors
CRM-like workflows that fit real agency operations
Products that directly improve close probability
theirFear: Paying for low-intent leads that agents ignore
Losing listings because competitors have better data or faster outreach
Agent churn caused by poor platform ROI and workflow friction

jobsToBeDone.name: Acquire and monetize listings
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Win more seller mandates and turn them into high-performing listings that create closings and commission revenue.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Higher local listing share, more productive agents, and better commission yield per territory.

steps.description: Find likely sellers and attractive properties in target geographies before or as they enter market intent.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Prospection Map
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Surfaces owner intent and geographic prospecting opportunities for local farming.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Property Valuation Tool
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Helps agents pitch credible pricing and demonstrate market expertise.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Estimation Funnel
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Creates seller-intent signals and lead capture opportunities that can be routed to agencies.

steps.description: Prioritize the best opportunities and assign the right agent to pursue them.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Seller Lead Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Tracks seller leads through stages and supports nurture, follow-up, and ownership.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Lead x Agent Matching
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Matches seller opportunities to agents most likely to convert.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Actor Scoring
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Adds quality and prioritization signals for agencies, agents, and prospects.

steps.description: Publish mandates efficiently and optimize visibility and reach across channels.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Online Classifieds Acquisition
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Enables creation and editing of professional listings in the pro environment.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Classifieds Portfolio Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Gives agencies control over listing operations, edits, publish states, and portfolio actions.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Classifieds Visibility Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Lets agencies shape distribution and paid exposure for inventory.

jobsToBeDone.name: Convert marketplace demand into closings
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Capture buyer inquiries, route them well, and improve team responsiveness so listing demand turns into revenue.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Higher close rates, better ROI on spend, and more predictable platform unit economics.

steps.description: Ingest buyer leads from listings and sort them by urgency, value, and likely fit.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Intermediary Seeker Leads Inbox
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Creates an operational inbox for incoming buyer demand.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Lead Scorings
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Prioritizes leads by predicted quality and conversion likelihood.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Call Tracking
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Measures call-generated demand and attribution quality.

steps.description: Assign leads quickly, coordinate communication, and keep promising demand warm.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Chat Messaging Services
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Enables traceable communication and supports responsiveness management.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Marketing Automation
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Automates follow-up and nurture for leads not yet ready to transact.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Notification Service
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Improves speed-to-response and task completion across agents.

steps.description: Understand which listings, channels, and agents produce the best economics.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Classifieds Performance Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Shows listing-level performance and helps justify paid exposure decisions.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Agency Visibility Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Lets agencies purchase and manage brand-level exposure products.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Business Analytics
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides reporting inputs for platform ROI and account management.

top.name: Commission revenue growth
top.description: Incremental brokerage revenue generated from listings and buyer/seller demand captured through the platform.

children.name: Mandate win rate
children.description: Share of pursued seller opportunities converted into signed mandates.

children.name: Seller lead contact SLA attainment
children.description: Share of seller leads contacted within target response window.

children.name: Local listing share
children.description: Agency share of active listings in target geographies or farm areas.

children.name: Median first response time

children.name: Qualified lead rate

top.name: B2B ARR
top.description: Recurring and usage-based revenue from agencies, brokers, and professional operators on the platform.

children.name: Product penetration per account
children.description: Average number of paid products used by active agency accounts.

children.name: Revenue per active agency
children.description: Average monthly revenue across active professional accounts.

children.name: Visibility and advertising revenue
children.description: Revenue from featured listings, brand visibility, and off-platform promotion products.

children.name: Visibility attach rate
children.description: Share of agencies purchasing a visibility product in a given billing period.

productStrategy.vision: Be the indispensable growth operating system for residential professionals by combining inventory distribution, lead monetization, prospecting intelligence, and workflow software into one ROI-positive platform.

1_year.focus: Fix B2B workflow gaps, prove lead quality, and improve listing operations fundamentals.
milestones: Launch or stabilize pro shell and core listing workflows
Provide transparent performance reporting for listings and leads
Improve lead inbox, routing, and response tooling
Standardize visibility and upsell product packaging
Establish baseline professional account health scoring

3_year.focus: Scale from ad marketplace to operating system for agency growth and productivity.

customerKPI.northStar: Commission revenue growth from platform-sourced activity

supporting: Share of wallet in top accounts

milestones: Launch prospecting intelligence suite tied to farm areas and seller intent
Introduce predictive lead scoring and recommended actions
Bundle CRM-like workflow, automation, and analytics into premium plans
Create account-level ROI dashboards for renewals and upsells
Enable multi-office and enterprise account structures

5_year.focus: Evolve into a financialized B2B ecosystem where the platform mediates not just leads but growth capital, operational tooling, and transaction infrastructure.
milestones: Expose APIs for CRM, marketing, and transaction partners
Create app and data marketplace for brokerages
Integrate financing, closing, and post-close partner workflows
Operationalize platform-native benchmarking across agencies
Expand from lead generation to transaction operating infrastructure

customers.name: Broker Software / Integration Partner
customers.description: A B2B integration partner whose software is used by brokerages and agents to create and manage listings before those listings are imported into the marketplace. They are accountable for reliable data exchange, workflow fit with brokers, and maintaining their strategic position in the brokerage stack. Economic success is driven by retained broker accounts, listing volume flowing through integrations, and expansion into value-added data or workflow services. Failure risk is broken imports, schema mismatches, stale listing sync, duplicate inventory, or brokers bypassing them and publishing directly to the platform.
careAbout: Proof that integrated listings perform well on the marketplace
Maintaining strategic relevance in broker workflows
winsThem: Well-documented import and sync APIs
Clear validation and error reporting
Sandbox and certification environments
Strong operational monitoring for listing delivery
Mutual roadmap alignment around richer listing capabilities
theirFear: Listings failing to publish or update correctly at scale
Brokers blaming them for marketplace data quality issues
The marketplace disintermediating them with direct broker tools

jobsToBeDone.name: Deliver accurate broker listings into the marketplace
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Transform broker-authored listing data into marketplace-compliant inventory with high reliability, low latency, and minimal manual intervention.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: High publish success, low sync error rates, and trusted listing flow between broker systems and the marketplace.

steps.step: Map broker listing data to marketplace requirements
steps.description: Align broker-side fields, media, statuses, and business rules with the marketplace's listing model and validation logic.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Data Foundation
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Defines canonical entities, schemas, and documentation needed for reliable partner data mapping.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Property Knowledge
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides normalized property attributes and reference rules needed to standardize incoming listing content.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: GeoRef
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Ensures addresses, geographies, and location hierarchies are normalized consistently across imported listings.

steps.description: Submit new or updated listings, detect validation failures, and ensure compliant assets and attributes are accepted by the platform.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Online Classifieds Acquisition
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Acts as the ingestion surface and operational path for professional inventory entering the marketplace.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Fraud Detection
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Applies trust and integrity checks so imported inventory remains compliant and safe.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Data Platform
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports ingestion pipelines, validation workflows, observability, and scalable partner data processing.

steps.description: Keep price, availability, status, media, and metadata continuously in sync as brokers edit listings in their upstream software.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Classifieds Portfolio Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides listing state management and portfolio-level controls that downstream sync processes must align to.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Notification Service
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports alerts on failures, rejections, or state changes requiring partner action.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Business Analytics
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Tracks import success, latency, coverage, and failure patterns for operational improvement.

jobsToBeDone.name: Prove integration value to broker clients
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Demonstrate that brokers using the integration partner get dependable marketplace distribution, better operational efficiency, and strong listing outcomes.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Higher broker retention, stronger partner leverage in renewals, and expansion into premium integration or data services.

steps.description: Track whether broker listings are published, refreshed, and merchandised correctly across the marketplace.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Classifieds Performance Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides listing-level visibility into impressions, engagement, and performance after import.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Classifieds Visibility Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Shows how imported inventory is distributed and surfaced, which is critical to broker-perceived value.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Business Analytics
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Enables partner reporting on delivery reliability, coverage, and performance trends.

steps.step: Resolve broker and marketplace issues quickly
steps.description: Identify the root cause of publication, duplication, schema, or media issues and coordinate fixes before broker trust erodes.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Data Platform
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides event logs, pipeline observability, and operational diagnostics for issue resolution.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Classifieds Portfolio Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Allows inspection of listing states and supports remediation workflows at portfolio scale.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Notification Service
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Surfaces failures and remediation triggers to the right operator quickly.

steps.description: Move from basic listing import to richer workflows like media sync, lead routing, analytics, and premium distribution controls.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Intermediary Seeker Leads Inbox
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Creates future integration value around routing marketplace demand back into broker software.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Data Monetization
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports packaging premium reporting, analytics, or partner data products as commercial upsells.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Agency Visibility Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Creates expansion opportunities around premium distribution and brand exposure products integrated into broker tools.

top.name: Broker integration retention
top.description: The partner's ability to retain broker clients by delivering reliable marketplace connectivity and measurable distribution value.

children.name: Listing publish success rate
children.description: Share of submitted listings and updates successfully accepted and published by the marketplace.

children.name: Validation error rate
children.description: Share of listing submissions failing schema, content, or policy checks.

children.name: Sync latency
children.description: Time between a broker-side listing update and reflected marketplace state.

children.name: Freshness SLA attainment
children.description: Share of listing updates reflected within target freshness windows.

children.name: Integrated listing coverage
children.description: Share of a broker's active inventory that successfully reaches the marketplace through the partner.

children.name: Duplicate / missing listing incidence
children.description: Rate of active inventory with duplicate, missing, or inconsistent marketplace representation.

children.name: Issue resolution time
children.description: Median time to diagnose and resolve broker-reported marketplace integration issues.

children.name: Escalation rate
children.description: Share of issues requiring manual support escalation beyond standard operational flows.

top.name: Integration ecosystem ARR
top.description: Recurring and usage-based revenue generated from integration partners that supply broker-authored inventory into the marketplace.

children.name: Imported active listings
children.description: Number of active marketplace listings sourced through certified integration partners.

children.name: Partner broker penetration
children.description: Share of target broker accounts using a certified partner integration to publish inventory.

children.name: Supply freshness quality
children.description: Marketplace-level quality of imported inventory based on update timeliness and state accuracy.

children.name: Stale imported listing rate
children.description: Share of imported listings not updated within acceptable freshness thresholds.

children.name: Partner platform revenue
children.description: Revenue from certification, API access, premium sync services, and partner-level commercial agreements.

children.name: Revenue per active integration partner
children.description: Average monthly revenue across active certified integration partners.

children.name: Downstream monetized supply
children.description: Revenue indirectly supported by imported listings through B2B visibility products, lead monetization, and supply-side subscriptions.

children.name: Imported listing monetization rate
children.description: Share of imported listings attached to paid visibility, lead, or subscription products.

productStrategy.vision: Make the marketplace the easiest and most trusted destination for broker software partners to syndicate, synchronize, and enrich professional inventory, while turning integrations into a durable supply, workflow, and revenue moat.

1_year.focus: Stabilize ingestion, validation, sync reliability, and partner support so imported inventory becomes operationally trustworthy at scale.

revenueStreams: Broker-facing supply subscriptions supported by imported inventory
Indirect revenue from monetized imported listings

milestones: Define canonical import schema and partner validation rules
Launch sandbox, certification, and test tooling for partners
Create partner-facing error diagnostics and monitoring dashboards
Establish sync freshness SLAs and alerting
Reduce duplicate and stale listing incidence across imported supply

3_year.focus: Scale the partner channel into a strategic broker distribution layer with richer workflows, analytics, and two-way operational integration.
3_year.productTheme: Partner platform for broker workflow distribution

revenueStreams: Premium analytics for partners and brokers
Lead routing and workflow integration add-ons
supporting: Imported listing share of total professional supply

milestones: Enable two-way integrations for listing status, lead routing, and performance feedback
Launch partner analytics reporting on inventory quality and marketplace outcomes
Create tiered partner program with certification and commercial benefits
Support richer media, metadata, and workflow events in sync APIs
Operationalize partner success management for top broker software providers

5_year.focus: Turn integrations into a platform ecosystem where broker systems build on the marketplace as infrastructure rather than just syndicating into it.
5_year.productTheme: Marketplace infrastructure for broker software ecosystems

supporting: Share of broker workflows touching marketplace infrastructure
Average modules adopted per integration partner

revenueStreams: Data and analytics subscriptions for partner platforms
Revenue share from embedded marketplace products inside broker software

milestones: Expose event-driven marketplace infrastructure for upstream broker systems
Embed marketplace monetization products directly inside partner software
Create app ecosystem standards for listing, lead, analytics, and workflow modules
Use imported supply and downstream demand data to build partner benchmarking products
Establish the marketplace as the default operating rail for broker software distribution

customers.name: Mortgage Lender / Data Monetization Partner
customers.description: A partner accountable for acquiring high-intent housing customers or monetizing property and market intelligence through the platform. Economic success is driven by funded loans, qualified applications, data product sales, or partner ROI. Failure risk is poor intent matching, compliance issues, low conversion from referred demand, or weak data trustworthiness.
careAbout: Access to high-intent, consented housing demand
winsThem: Embedded workflows at moments of highest decision intent
Transparent attribution and funnel visibility
Data products with clear quality and coverage
API-based integration and scalable distribution
Low-friction conversion surfaces inside consumer journeys
theirFear: Buying referrals that do not convert into funded loans or revenue
Reputational or regulatory exposure from poor consent and disclosures
Depending on data that is stale, incomplete, or not decision-grade

jobsToBeDone.name: Acquire high-intent financial customers from housing journeys
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Capture borrowers when purchase intent is strongest and convert them into funded products.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Lower CAC, higher funded-loan conversion, and durable access to housing demand.

steps.step: Enter at the right decision moment
steps.description: Surface financing or insurance offers when a seeker is evaluating affordability or a next transaction step.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Home Purchase Financing
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Embeds affordability and financing intent capture directly in property consideration flows.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Classified Details Page (CDP)
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Creates high-intent placement moments adjacent to property decisions.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Property Decision Tools
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Adds context that increases borrower readiness and conversion quality.

steps.description: Capture structured applicant information and tie it to consent, source, and downstream outcomes.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Seeker Lead Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides a structured lead object and lifecycle tracking for partner demand.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Business Analytics
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supplies attribution and performance reporting inputs.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Cookie Consent Management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports compliant data capture and partner measurement practices.

steps.description: Improve funnel conversion by targeting the right segments and learning from outcome data.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Data Foundation
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Organizes and documents the data assets needed for repeatable partner products.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Data Platform
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Enables scalable data delivery, experimentation, and partner measurement pipelines.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Data Monetization
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Packages partner-facing data and insight products as recurring commercial offerings.

jobsToBeDone.name: License trusted housing intelligence
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Use the platform's property, market, and behavioral data to improve pricing, underwriting, prospecting, or product strategy.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Recurring data revenue for the platform and decision-grade insight for partners.

steps.description: Specify whether the partner needs pricing intelligence, market dynamics, customer signals, or benchmarking.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Market Knowledge
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides market-level pricing and supply-demand context for partner analytics.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Property Knowledge
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supplies normalized property-level attributes and history.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Economic Content Creation
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Transforms raw data into usable insight and narrative products.

steps.description: Receive datasets, APIs, or reports in a format suitable for operational use.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Data Platform
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Delivers governed partner access paths for data consumption.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Data Foundation
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides discoverability, documentation, and trust in datasets.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: GeoRef
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Standardizes location joins and geographic comparability across datasets.

steps.description: Demonstrate ROI and broaden the relationship into additional partner products.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Business Analytics
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Measures usage, revenue, and partner outcome proxies.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Data Monetization
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Supports packaging, pricing, and commercial expansion of data products.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Unstructured Data Processing
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Enriches datasets using text, image, and other unstructured housing signals.

top.name: Partner ROI
top.description: Economic return partners realize from platform-sourced demand or licensed housing intelligence.

children.name: Qualified application rate
children.description: Share of referred users progressing to a complete partner application or equivalent intent milestone.

children.name: Intent match score
children.description: Degree to which referred users match partner underwriting or target criteria.

children.name: Funded / activated conversion rate
children.description: Share of referred or matched users resulting in a monetized partner outcome.

children.name: Cost per funded customer
children.description: Partner acquisition cost for a monetized housing customer.

children.name: Data coverage adequacy
children.description: Share of partner target geographies, properties, or segments covered by the dataset.

children.name: Data freshness SLA attainment
children.description: Share of datasets delivered within freshness targets.

children.name: Partner integration effort
children.description: Time and engineering work needed for the partner to operationalize the platform's data or demand feed.

children.name: API / feed reliability
children.description: Availability and successful delivery rate of partner-facing data interfaces.

top.name: Partner ecosystem revenue
top.description: Revenue from lenders, insurers, utilities, data buyers, and other ecosystem participants.

children.name: Partner attach rate
children.description: Share of eligible housing journeys that engage a partner product.

children.name: High-intent finance starts
children.description: Number of seekers entering a partner-eligible financing or service workflow.

children.name: Embedded finance revenue
children.description: Revenue from funded loans, referrals, preapprovals, or other embedded financial outcomes.

children.name: Revenue per funded customer
children.description: Average platform revenue earned per completed partner-finance outcome.

children.name: Data subscription revenue
children.description: Recurring revenue from licensed datasets, APIs, and analytics products.

children.name: Partner logo retention
children.description: Share of data partners renewing their contracts or subscriptions.

productStrategy.vision: Build a partner ecosystem where the marketplace is not only a source of traffic, but the underlying intent, data, and orchestration layer powering housing finance and housing intelligence products.

1_year.focus: Prove clean finance and partner attach points while laying the data governance foundation for monetization.
milestones: Embed finance widgets into high-intent listing journeys
Build partner attribution and outcome measurement
Establish data product packaging and governance standards
Launch initial lender and service-provider integrations
Create commercial and technical templates for partner onboarding

3_year.focus: Scale into a multi-partner ecosystem with differentiated data products and stronger decision-grade signals.

revenueStreams: API access and usage-based partner fees
supporting: Gross margin by partner product line

milestones: Launch partner marketplace with multiple lenders and service categories
Expose governed partner APIs for demand and data access
Package market, property, and behavioral intelligence into subscription tiers
Add benchmarking and predictive insights for partners
Create compliance and consent control plane across partner products

5_year.focus: Financialize the ecosystem so the platform becomes a transaction and intelligence infrastructure layer for housing markets.

supporting: Share of partner housing acquisition sourced from platform

milestones: Launch decisioning APIs backed by property and market graph intelligence
Monetize standardized housing intent and property identifiers across partners
Create recurring enterprise contracts with lenders, insurers, and institutional operators
Turn partner integrations into a scalable platform program
Establish defensible data network effects from combined consumer, owner, and professional workflows
